title: treelumber
description: TreeLumber is a Minecraft mod that simplifies tree-cutting by allowing players to cut down any type of tree in Minecraft with just one cut.
body:
TreeLumber is a Minecraft mod that simplifies the process of cutting down trees. With this mod, players can cut down any type of tree in Minecraft with just one cut, saving time and effort.  TreeLumber enhances the Minecraft experience by making tree-cutting more efficient and adding new features for players to explore.

All types of wood, all types of axes.

![axes and wood types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7039a20e30524ff2e8cc6b77218ba0f1c3166e05.png)




cuts all the wood columns with the length between 4-10, if is <4, it cuts one by one 
 
![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbd4fcaafac41d469395094366da5d6ec5602f0e.png)

Installation

- Install Forge.
- Download the mod.
- Navigate to your .minecraft folder.
- paste the mod on the mods folder.
- Play!
